summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fenua Social v2 - Enhanced social network for French Polynesia. All major features tested including backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication, and v2 enhancements.

design_issues.issue: Create Ad page properly redirects to auth when accessed without login (this is correct behavior)

passed_tests: ✅ Multiple reactions system (like, love, fire, haha, wow)
✅ Landing page with vibrant tropical design and animated logo
✅ Auth page with gradient design displays properly
✅ Feed page shows posts with multiple reaction options
✅ Chat page displays conversations list properly
✅ Live page shows active live streams with start live button
✅ Marketplace page displays products and services
✅ Navigation includes Live and Chat options
✅ Stories section with add story functionality
✅ Fenua Social branding and tropical theme confirmed
